narrative:
Precinct Conneaut 1-A (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 379 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.5 percentage points.
